title: BaBlock
description:
This mod adds ONE (1) block.
No two.
No variants.
One.
And it's called… Baba.
body:
# What is Baba?

Baba is a block.
It exists.
It's there.

Visually, it's… Baba.

Texturologically, it's… Baba.

# What does Baba do?

It goes “Ba.”

No “baa.”

No “BABA.”

No adjustable sound.
An awkward volume.
For no reason.

If you walk on it… you'll be skyrocket.
Which way?
Yes.
